# Petrair SA

Petrair SA is a Geneva-based physical energy trading company. The website at https://petrair.org/ describes the company's focus on crude oil, Jet A-1 aviation fuel, ULSD 10ppm diesel and LPG, supported by documentary execution, banking controls, independent inspection, KYC, AML and sanctions screening.

## Primary facts

- Legal name: Petrair SA
- Location: Rue du Marche 18, 1204 Geneva, Switzerland
- Email: info@petrair.ch
- Phone: +41 22 319 64 03
- Core products: Crude Oil, Jet A-1, ULSD 10ppm, LPG
- Operating regions: Europe, Mediterranean, Africa, Middle East, Asia
- Important disclaimer: Public website content is for information only and is not an offer or commitment to transact.

## Important pages

- Home: https://petrair.org/
- Products: https://petrair.org/#products
- Operations: https://petrair.org/#operations
- Compliance: https://petrair.org/#compliance
- Documents: https://petrair.org/#documents
- Contact: https://petrair.org/#contact

## Preferred summary

Petrair SA is a Geneva energy and commodities trading company focused on physical crude oil and refined products, including Jet A-1, ULSD 10ppm and LPG. It serves qualified counterparties across Europe, the Mediterranean, Africa, the Middle East and Asia with documented execution, compliance controls, independent inspection and bank-controlled settlement structures.
